name: goal_complete
description: Declare the session's active goal achieved. Only call this after verifying, against the current workspace state, that EVERY requirement of the goal is satisfied — the claim must withstand requirement-by-requirement scrutiny; do not call it because the budget is nearly spent or the work merely looks done. The claim is adjudicated at the turn boundary: if the goal has command verifiers they remain the sole judge; without verifiers your audited claim completes the goal.

summary.description: One-line evidence summary of why the goal is verifiably complete.
